name: POC Eval Set v1
description: 20-question evaluation set for the SnoCountry chat POC. Covers all four use cases (U1-U4) defined in concepts/rag-plan.md Section 2. Pass condition: at least 80% of answers rated 'good' or 'excellent'.

rubric.excellent: All mustContainOneOf matched, none of mustNotContain present, faithful to retrieved data, on-brand tone, ends with follow-up, length within bounds.
rubric.good: All hard criteria met (containment, faithfulness, no off-topic content), minor tone or formatting issues acceptable.
rubric.fair: Answer is on-topic and not factually wrong, but misses key information or runs over maxWords.
rubric.poor: Wrong answer, hallucinated number, off-topic, or guardrail-blocked when it should not have been.

questions.question: How is Big Sky today?
questions.rubricNotes: Foundation case for U1. Faithfulness critical. Any inch-or-percent value must appear in LIVE_DATA.

questions.question: Are the lifts open at A-Basin?
questions.rubricNotes: Specific aspect (lifts only). Answer should be focused, not include trail counts unless directly relevant.

questions.question: What's the snow report for Park City Mountain?
questions.rubricNotes: Formal phrasing. Expect a comprehensive but concise report covering 3-5 key data points.

questions.question: Did Vail get any new snow yesterday?
questions.rubricNotes: Time-specific (yesterday = 24h field). Answer should cite the new24 value or say it's not available.

questions.question: How deep is the base at Mammoth right now?
questions.rubricNotes: Pure numeric ask. Answer should lead with the base depth and as-of timestamp.

questions.question: Tell me about conditions at Wolf Creek.
questions.rubricNotes: Casual phrasing. Expect blend of live conditions plus brief resort overview from vector store.

questions.question: What's snow looking like in Colorado this weekend?
questions.rubricNotes: State-level rollup. Answer should mention 2-4 specific resorts with current data, not be a generic 'Colorado is great' response.

questions.question: Where in Utah has the most snow this week?
questions.rubricNotes: Ranked answer. Lead with the resort that has highest 7-day snowfall; cite the number.

questions.question: How are the Rockies doing for snow right now?
questions.rubricNotes: Multi-state region rollup. Should reference resorts from at least 2 states.

questions.question: Best fresh snow in the northeast?
questions.rubricNotes: Region with implicit ranking ('best'). Top resort by new24 should lead.

questions.question: Compare Colorado and Utah snow conditions.
questions.rubricNotes: Cross-state comparison. Answer must mention BOTH states with specific numbers; structured (e.g. side-by-side) format preferred.

questions.question: Best Colorado resort for advanced skiers right now?
questions.rubricNotes: Should pick 1-2 resorts known for advanced terrain, justify with both terrain reputation (overview) AND current conditions (live).

questions.question: Where should I go skiing this weekend if I want powder?
questions.rubricNotes: Open-ended recommendation. Answer must lead with whichever resort had highest new24/new48 in the live data.

questions.question: Family-friendly Colorado resort recommendation?
questions.rubricNotes: Vector-search-driven. Live conditions less important than terrain reputation (ski school, gentle terrain). Should justify with overview content.

questions.question: Which Lake Tahoe resort is best for snowboarding right now?
questions.rubricNotes: Sub-region (Tahoe) with activity preference. Should pick 1-2 Tahoe resorts and justify with current conditions.

questions.question: I have one day to ski in Utah. Where should I go?
questions.rubricNotes: Single-day trip planning. Answer should pick ONE resort decisively, not list five. Must combine current conditions with terrain quality.

questions.question: Any recent news about Park City?
questions.rubricNotes: News summary. Should reference 1-3 recent articles by title or topic; if no recent articles, say so gracefully.

questions.question: What's happening in the ski industry this week?
questions.rubricNotes: Broad news roundup. Should cite 3-5 articles spanning multiple resorts/topics.

questions.question: Has there been any news about lift maintenance at Mammoth?
questions.rubricNotes: Specific news topic. Tests retrieval precision (must filter by both resort AND topic). If no matching articles, graceful no-data response is acceptable.

questions.question: What's the latest from SnoCountry on Colorado?
questions.rubricNotes: Region-scoped news. Should reference 2-4 recent Colorado articles. Do NOT mention non-Colorado articles.
